modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Continuous beeping noise from the network equipment closet.

full_description_text:
- So, I was just minding my own business when I noticed this really annoying beeping sound coming from the IT closet. 
- It’s like a persistent alarm that just won’t quit, and it’s coming from the trouble panel in there. 
- I’m not sure what’s causing it, but it’s super distracting, especially when I’m trying to focus on my work. 
- I thought maybe it was just a one-time thing, but nope, it just keeps going!
short_description: Continuous beeping noise from the network equipment closet.
